SEARCH
Package com.example.eventsapp

Class Entrant

java.lang.Object
com.example.eventsapp.Entrant
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class Entrant extends Object implements Serializable
Represents an applicant/entrant for an event waitlist. This class tracks the entrant's information and their current status in the selection process.
See Also:
  • Serialized Form

    Class
    Description
    static enum 
    Entrant.Status
    Enumeration of possible statuses for an entrant.

  • Constructor Details

    • Entrant

      public Entrant()

    • Entrant

      public Entrant(String id, String eventId, String name, String email, Entrant.Status status)
      Constructs a new Entrant.
      Parameters:
      id - The unique ID of the entrant. If null, a random UUID is generated.
      eventId - The ID of the event the entrant is applying for.
      name - The name of the entrant.
      email - The email of the entrant.
      status - The initial status of the entrant. Defaults to APPLIED if null.

      public boolean isChosenInvited()
      Checks if the entrant has been chosen (status is INVITED or ACCEPTED).
      Returns:
      True if chosen, false otherwise.
